notes: Profile aggregated from wheat rows: drought, Fusarium/Bipolaris root diseases and phosphorus limitation
Profile aggregated from barley rows: salinity, cold stress and juvenile growth promotion
Profile aggregated from rye row: snow mold pressure under snow cover
Profile aggregated from rice rows: blast, bacterial leaf blight and nitrogen-fixing growth promotion
Profile aggregated from potato rows: late blight, Rhizoctonia, common scab and tuber growth constraints
Profile aggregated from tomato rows: Fusarium/Verticillium wilt and root development after transplanting
Profile aggregated from soybean rows: Fusarium seedling disease, nodulation and nitrogen fixation focus
Profile aggregated from pea rows: Fusarium root disease and nitrogen/protein accumulation
Profile aggregated from bean rows: anthracnose, iron/phosphorus availability and vegetative biomass stimulation
Profile aggregated from tobacco rows: black shank, tobacco mosaic virus and ISR priming
Profile aggregated from sunflower rows: drought, Sclerotinia and phosphorus-linked oilseed productivity
